metadata.title: Mobile Units and Skid Systems | Welltech®
metadata.description: Plug-and-play stainless mobile skid units that can be easily transported within the facility, equipped with their own pump, automation panel, and tank.

hero.title: Mobile (Skid) Units
hero.desc: 'Plug-and-Play' compact process systems equipped with ready-to-use tanks, pumps, and panels that can be easily transported to all stations in your facility.

technology.title: Compact Skid Technology
technology.desc: Mobile units (Skid Systems) are portable systems where the entire machinery park (tank, pump, filter, panel) is gathered on a single stainless steel frame without requiring fixed piping or infrastructure construction. They are easily pulled from one line to another via wheels within the facility; production starts instantly simply by connecting to electricity (or air). It is the most flexible form of modular production.

features.title: Hardware and Portability Features
items: Special Stainless Steel Frame Resistant to Heavy Loads
Polyamide Wheels for Fast Transition Between Stations
Plug & Play Structure Requiring No Installation or Piping
Safe Electrical Wiring and Control Panel Included
Flexible Hose Fittings (Clamped) Connectable to Different Lines

table.title: System Types and Modules
table.note: * Mobile units are specially sized according to the requested capacity (e.g., 500L or 1000L) and the equipment to be used.

items.q: Can I use the mobile unit in an ATEX (Flammable) environment?
items.a: Yes. If the product you are transferring is flammable/combustible, the wheels of the mobile unit are made of antistatic (conductive) material, and it is made 100% ATEX compliant by adding an air-operated diaphragm pump and pneumatic mixer instead of an electric motor.

items.q: What is the maximum tank volume on a skid?
items.a: In mobile units, considering the load capacity of the wheels and the operator's ability to push it with human power, tanks with a maximum volume of 1,000 Liters (1 Ton) are generally used.

reference.desc: Multi-station mobile mixer and pump carts we designed for a large capacity sauce factory.

cta.title: What Should Be On It?
cta.desc: Let's combine a tank, pump, filter, and heater on a single skid. Send us the modules you want, and we'll draw it up.
